nodes.name: Cron Trigger
nodes.notes: HOURLY: Runs every hour 24/7 to fetch crypto global metrics from CoinGecko

nodes.name: Get Global Data
nodes.notes: FAST: Fetches global crypto market data (market cap, volume, dominance)

nodes.name: Get Top Prices
nodes.notes: FAST: Fetches BTC, ETH, SOL prices and 24h change

nodes.name: Normalize Metrics
nodes.notes: FAST: Normalizes CoinGecko data into standard output schema with regime detection

nodes.name: Signal Detection
nodes.notes: FAST: Analyzes metrics for trading signals and regime description

nodes.name: Format Summary
nodes.notes: FAST: Formats human-readable summary in Spanish for briefing

nodes.name: Store JSON Cache
nodes.notes: FAST: Persists latest metrics as JSON for other workflows

nodes.name: Store Text Summary
nodes.notes: FAST: Persists human-readable summary as text file

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: FAST: On-demand webhook to retrieve current crypto global metrics

nodes.name: Read Cache
nodes.notes: FAST: Reads latest cached metrics for webhook response

nodes.name: Parse Cache JSON
nodes.notes: FAST: Parses cached JSON data for webhook response
